programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Bully
programme.desc: Blake must work with her retired police captain father and her detective brother to solve a series of murders in Kansas City.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Black Queen
programme.desc: A murder investigation results in Garcia delving into her hacker past -- and reconnecting with a former flame.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Road Home
programme.desc: As the team searches for a vigilante killer in Cleveland, Rossi's former Marine sergeant goes missing in Los Angeles; J.J.'s secret catches up with her.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU learns of JJ's kidnapping, they discover that Cruz has also been abducted and delve into the files of a classified assignment; the team uncovers details of INTEGRITY, the covert database born out of the operation to find Osama bin Laden.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Mr. & Mrs. Anderson
programme.desc: The team searches for a pair of suspects responsible for several murders near Pittsburgh; Morgan and Garcia make Valentine's Day plans with their significant others.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Gabby
programme.desc: The BAU makes startling discoveries as they search for a 4-year-old girl who went missing while staying with a relative.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Right + Wrong + Both + Neither
programme.desc: When Russ' first love, Emilia, is kidnapped by the same rebels he fought during his private military contract days, he takes the Phoenix team to a small, impoverished town to rescue her and rid the town of the rebels for good.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Mac + Desi + Riley + Aubrey
programme.desc: A double date descends into chaos when Mac and Desi witness a murder in the back of the restaurant; as they work to find the killer, Riley tries to keep the secret about her and her friends' "day jobs' from her new boyfriend.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Father + Son + Father + Matriarch
programme.desc: After Oversight is almost killed in a bombing, he recruits Mac to help him find the suspected bomber; Mac meets his Aunt Gwendolyn.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Code + Artemis + Nuclear + N3mesis
programme.desc: Los Angeles' power grid is taken hostage in a ransomware attack resulting in a citywide blackout; the team discovers the ransomware code used was written by Riley years ago.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Tesla + Bell + Edison + Mac
programme.desc: When Mac is put into a dream state to help him recall key evidence found in Nikola Tesla's secret lab that could stop Codex's deadly plot, he encounters Nikola Tesla, Alexander Graham Bell, Thomas Edison and his mother.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Psy-Op + Cell + Merchant + Birds
programme.desc: Mac is placed inside a fake prison cell with a top Codex operative, "The Merchant," to gain his trust and get intel on their next move.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Loyalty + Family + Rogue + Hellfire
programme.desc: The team is forever altered when MacGyver's Aunt Gwen gets into his head and convinces Mac and Riley to join Codex; Matty and Russ take their concerns about Codex to the White House.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Save + The + Dam + World
programme.desc: Mac and Riley's mission is interrupted when Russ, Desi and the Phoenix team move to prevent Codex from detonating a weapon of mass destruction; the team discovers Russ' real reason for purchasing the Phoenix Foundation.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Maggots in the Meathead
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth head to the Jersey Shore when decomposed remains are discovered; the team becomes fond of Booth's girlfriend; Angela tries to keep a secret.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Body and the Bounty
programme.desc: When a skull and decomposing hands are found in a dumpster, the team searches for the rest of the victim's remains; Brennan agrees to shoot an episode of a children's show with professor Bunsen, "The Science Dude" Jude (David Alan Grier).

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Bones That Weren't
programme.desc: The skull of a promising young dancer is discovered at a construction site; Hannah's safety is jeopardized when an assignment takes her to a dangerous part of town.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Shallow in the Deep
programme.desc: Human remains from a 150-year-old slave ship surface; the investigation leads Booth and Brennan to a cruise where a murder victim is seen moments before his death.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Babe in the Bar
programme.desc: An event for a candy maker (Wayne Knight) turns bitter when human remains are discovered in the world's largest chocolate bar; Cam struggles with her daughter's decision to attend a college that fails to meet her high standards.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Twisted Bones in the Melted Truck
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate a crime scene where a human carcass has melted to the dashboard of a charred truck; Sweets tries to keep his feelings for Daisy from interfering while helping her pass a government psychological evaluation.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Doctor in the Photo
programme.desc: A brilliant and career-driven surgeon is found dead in a rough neighborhood; a new friend helps Brennan make a discovery about herself.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: A body is found in the shower of a home belonging to a young socialite; Hodgins and Angela talk about their future; Booth talks to Hannah about Brennan's feeling for him.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Bullet in the Brain
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates when a notorious murderer known as "The Gravedigger" (Deirdre Lovejoy) is killed by a sniper.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Sin in the Sisterhood
programme.desc: A man's corpse disguised as a scarecrow is found in a cornfield; Booth and Brennan question the victim's three wives, who are also sisters; Cam doubts her relationship.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Daredevil in the Mold
programme.desc: The team analyzes a BMX rider's remains, discovered on the roof of a warehouse; Sweets asks Booth for advice; Booth makes a decision about Hannah.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Bikini in the Soup
programme.desc: When the liquefied remains of a wedding planner are found in a tanning bed on Valentine's Day, Cam pressures the team to work fast so she can spend the holiday with her boyfriend; Clark helps Hodgins realize the best gifts come from the heart.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Killer in the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Sniper Jacob Brodsky takes out a victim who escaped from the justice system; Booth uses his military training to try to stop Brodsky before he strikes again; Angela's father visits the Jeffersonian.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Blackout in the Blizzard
programme.desc: During a blizzard that causes a citywide blackout, the team must solve a murder case that could be connected to a possible viral outbreak; Sweets starts a touchy conversation about Brennan and Booth's relationship.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Feet on the Beach
programme.desc: Brennan teams up with a forensic podiatrist to match seven pairs of severed feet with bodies that wash ashore after a flood; Cam makes college plans for her daughter behind her back.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Truth in the Myth
programme.desc: A TV-show host's remains are found in the wilderness; Vincent Nigel-Murray makes surprising confessions while making amends with each member of the team.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The team joins forces with several federal agencies to stop a sniper who has been targeting crowded events in the city; FBI Special Agent Tammy Gregorio begins investigating Pride's team.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Pride faces more repercussions from the FBI after he helps a former Navy Intelligence Analyst who is the primary suspect in a multiple homicide case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: After the discovery of a petty officer's body inside a sports arena, evidence leads Pride and the NCIS team to a kidnapping case of another petty officer, last seen in Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The NCIS must come to the rescue of one of its own when Sebastian is kidnapped while dining in a restaurant with his mother; Sebastian relies on his gaming skills in a prison break.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Course Correction
programme.desc: The NCIS and the FBI investigate a private plane crash in the bayou that killed three sailors; Sonja and LaSalle interview candidates for a job opening on the team.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: One Good Man
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL candidate is murdered weeks before his graduation; Wade seeks Pride's help when her adopted son announces his plan to join the Navy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Outlaws
programme.desc: A sailor is murdered during a rowdy motorcycle rally in the city; LaSalle seeks personal advice from Gregorio.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Music to My Ears
programme.desc: After a member of the United States Navy Band is murdered in her home, Pride looks after the victim's nephew, who is the only witness to the crime.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: A'ohe Mea 'Imi a Ka Maka
programme.desc: On Halloween, Jerry and his friends search his childhood camp for evidence to a murder he witnessed as a boy; McGarrett investigates a little girl who drew pictures depicting the scene of a recent murder before it was discovered.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Aia I Hi'ikua; I Hi'Ialo
programme.desc: McGarrett crosses the line and is arrested while investigating the death of his former SEAL buddy who died while making an emergency landing on an aircraft carrier; Adam returns to Oahu with devastating news about his marriage.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Pua a'e La Ka Uwahi O Ka Moe
programme.desc: McGarrett investigates a cold case that his grandfather and the famous Honolulu detective Chang Apana worked on in the 1940s; McGarrett and Danny get ready for the opening of their restaurant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Lele Pu Na Manu Like
programme.desc: Grover's parents and brother arrive in Oahu for Thanksgiving; a thief is crushed to death by an empty safe.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Mai Ka Po Mai Ka 'Oia'i'o
programme.desc: When a renowned urban vigilante is killed after making a citizen's arrest, the team delves into the world of superheroes and comic books to find the killer; Adam gets closer to finding out who killed his sister.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Pio Ke Kukui, Pō'ele Ka Hale
programme.desc: After fighting off an assassin in his own home, McGarrett and Joe White flee to Montana to prepare for a battle against those exacting revenge for a past SEAL mission.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Hala I Ke Ala O'i'ole Mai
programme.desc: Still reeling from the murder of one of their own, Steve and Catherine, along with Danny, Junior and some old friends, hunt down the killer; a bag of human bones discovered inside an abandoned storage locker goes missing.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ka Hauli O Ka Mea Hewa 'Ole, He Nalowale Koke
programme.desc: McGarrett and the team support Danny and Rachel by determining what happened when Grace gets into a life-threatening car accident; Tani helps Koa when his rehab patient goes missing.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ke Iho Mai Nei Ko Luna
programme.desc: Adam, Junior and Tani travel to the bottom of the Pacific Ocean when a murder takes place in a remote underwater lab -- and the killer may still be on board.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ikiiki i ka la o Keawalua
programme.desc: While investigating Flippa's friend's murder, McGarrett and Grover uncover a deadly plan by an extremist group on the Island; Grover has an emotional reaction to the case.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ho'opio 'ia e ka noho ali'i a ka ua
programme.desc: As a dangerous hurricane hits Oahu, Five-0 is tasked with protecting El Diablo, a captured serial killer who is being hunted by an assassin; Tani's civilian safety check during the storm turns deadly; Rachel and Charlie evacuate to Danny's house.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Hapai ke kuko, hanau ka hewa
programme.desc: When the top salesperson for a beauty company pyramid scheme is murdered, the team sifts through a long list of possible suspects who would want her dead; Adam befriends a homeless man.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: E'ao lu'au a kualima
programme.desc: Junior is torn between his duties and his feelings for his former girlfriend when her new man is one of the culprits in a bank heist-turned-homicide.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ai No I Ka 'Ape He Mane'o No Ko Ka Nuku
programme.desc: Tani and Junior go undercover at a gym to track down a deadly batch of steroids; Danny and McGarrett work as bodyguards for Danny's high maintenance ex-mother-in-law, a famous romance novelist with whom he has never gotten along.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Pupuhi Ka He'e O Kai Uli
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a window washer and finds that the victim is actually a renowned street artist; Grover and Adam look into the murder of a gambler; Junior helps his father when they are reminded of his sister's death.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ke Ala O Ka Pu
programme.desc: When the team must locate a girl who purchased a gun from a junkie, it discovers that the firearm, over the course of decades, has affected all the teammates' lives.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Kill Screen
programme.desc: The team tries to help Ralph when he is taken by the FBI for questioning after his web game play unintentionally reveals a CIA safe house's location.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Charades
programme.desc: The team searches for a CIA mole who has been coerced into stealing deadly chemicals; Paige shows Walter how to flirt.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: The team must help an injured former Secret Service agent regain his memory in order to stop the launching of weapons of mass destruction.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Love Boat
programme.desc: The team members go undercover on a cruise ship in order to locate and disable stolen rockets; as Valentine's Day approaches, Ralph develops a crush.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: It Happened Last Night
programme.desc: The investigation into a chief warrant officer's death reveals that his wife has been abducted -- leaving the team with a 22-hour deadline; senior FBI agent Fornell assists with the case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Master of Horror
programme.desc: Amidst Halloween festivities in New Orleans, a Naval Staff Judge Advocate dressed in a costume is found dead in a cemetery; the team debates Halloween costumes and activities.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigate the murder of a Navy Officer assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer; Pride turns the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: A murdered petty officer -- with a proposal and an engagement ring -- is found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility; the members of the team are baffled when they cannot locate the victim's girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: The team reopens a cold case when a stolen Navy-issue gun turns out to belong to a chief petty officer who died 40 years ago; the team makes their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Stolen Valor
programme.desc: A retired SEAL -- who tracked people impersonating military personnel -- is murdered; Brody finds that LaSalle is uncharacteristically unenthusiastic about Christmas.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Baitfish
programme.desc: The investigation into an explosion at the Navy-Marine Corp Relief Gala reveals Pride was the bomb's target.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Abyss
programme.desc: The NCIS team and the Coast Guard Investigative Service work together when a Navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in a double murder on a research boat; LaSalle looks for his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After learning, he was poisoned with a deadly dose of radiation, a Navy lieutenant commander asks Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: An agent is killed while working on a security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations; Brody's past is evaluated.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: A petty officer is murdered during Mardi Gras festivities; Pride contemplates what to tell his daughter about his strained relationship with his father.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: The NCIS team tries to narrow down the motive when a Navy recruiter is murdered in a hit-and-run; Lasalle worries about his brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: More Now
programme.desc: Pride believes Baitfish has returned and has the NCIS team chase down leads in an attempt to locate him.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The List
programme.desc: When a sailor is killed in a strip club, the murder weapon turns out to be linked to other unsolved cases; Brody receives a visit from her ex-fiance.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Insider
programme.desc: During the autopsy of a petty officer who seems to have died of natural causes, an armed man holds Wade, Sebastian and Danny hostage in the morgue.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Rock-a-Bye-Baby
programme.desc: When a Navy commander's car is stolen with his baby inside, the team must determine if it was a targeted abduction.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: You'll Do
programme.desc: LaSalle's brother, Cade, needs the team's help when he becomes a murder suspect -- and cannot remember what happened; LaSalle is determined to prove Cade's innocence, despite the wealth of evidence against him.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: How Much Pain Can You Take?
programme.desc: Baitfish murders a person close to the team in order to send a message to Pride; a citywide hunt for the elusive criminal takes place.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.desc: Pride has suspicions about a mole; new intelligence comes to light that indicates a breach at the ports.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Sic Semper Tyranis
programme.desc: Pride and the team must go on a dangerous undercover mission to retrieve a stolen missile and prevent an attack.

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Once Bitten, Twice Die

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Young Hearts Spark Fire

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Crossroads
programme.desc: The team protects a witness who is on her way to testify against a dangerous drug cartel -- while the cartel is in hot pursuit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Game Over
programme.desc: The team investigates the possible murder of Jake Sullivan (Tony Hawk), a skateboarder and video-game tester.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Killer Date
programme.desc: Horatio gets life changing information about his deceased brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Recoil
programme.desc: When a bitter custody battle ends with a courthouse murder, the team must use the available evidence to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Vengeance

programme.desc: McGarrett turns to Odell Martin (Michael Imperioli) for help when a confidential informant is accused of murder.

programme.desc: A Russian spy steals a flash drive containing classified information that puts a Five-0 member at risk; McGarrett learns why Catherine left; Abby keeps her mission a secret.

programme.desc: When a deliberate chemical spill enables six dangerous inmates to escape, the team goes on an intensive manhunt to find them.

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: And God Said to Cain
programme.desc: A man takes his revenge on the family responsible for his wrongful sentence to ten years of hard labor.

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A mental-patient, who is troubled with horrible nightmares, has escaped from his hospital. Now on the streets he can’t help killing innocent people. But there is one family he is more than interested in and when he tries to kill them, he finds that it’s not that easy.

programme.title: Alice, Sweet Alice

programme.desc: A band of Mexican gun-runners employed by a revolutionary general accept an American into their gang, unaware of his intentions.

programme.desc: Fast-paced martial arts action finds freelance fighter Terry Tsuguri (Chiba) hired to spring a convicted killer from prison. But after he succeeds, his employers renege on their payment.

programme.title: Fist Of Fury
programme.desc: Bruce Lee's first chop-socky movie (made in Hong Kong) is action-filled and violent.

programme.title: Triumph Of The Ten Gladiators
programme.desc: Ten of the finest gladiators are sent to rescue their kidnapped queen from her traitorous prime minister.

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of the President
programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.desc: Two black bounty hunters, pursuing an outlaw, take over a small Western town without a sheriff.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys

As the three men revisit old haunts, reflect on their glory days and try to make up for lost time, one wrestles with a terrible quandary: Doc has orders to kill Val, and time is running out for him to figure out a way out of his dilemma.

programme.title: The Runner
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the BP oil spill, an idealistic but imperfect New Orleans politician (Nicolas Cage) finds his plans of restoration unraveling as his own life becomes contaminated with corruption, scandal and deceit.

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: Mia, an aspiring actress, serves lattes to movie stars in between auditions and Sebastian, a jazz musician, scrapes by playing cocktail party gigs in dingy bars, but as success mounts they are faced with decisions that begin to fray the fragile fabric of their love affair, and the dreams they worked so hard to maintain in each other threaten to rip them apart.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: On a fall night in 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer programming genius Mark Zuckerberg sits down at his computer and heatedly begins working on a new idea. In a fury of blogging and programming, what begins in his dorm room as a small site among friends soon becomes a global social network and a revolution in communication. A mere six years and 500 million friends later, Mark Zuckerberg is the youngest billionaire in history... but for this entrepreneur, success leads to both personal and le.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft traveling to a distant colony planet and transporting thousands of people has a malfunction in its sleep chambers. As a result, two passengers are awakened 90 years early.

programme.title: The Family Fang
programme.desc: A brother and sister return to their family home in search of their world famous parents who have disappeared.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: An adaptation of F. Scott Fitzgerald's Long Island-set novel, where Midwesterner Nick Carraway is lured into the lavish world of his neighbor, Jay Gatsby. Soon enough, however, Carraway will see through the cracks of Gatsby's nouveau riche existence, where obsession, madness, and tragedy await.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Wrongfully accused of murdering his wife, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find her killer and clear his name. Pursuing him is a team of U.S. marshals led by Deputy Samuel Gerard, a determined detective who will not rest until Richard is captured. As Richard leads the team through a series of intricate chases, he discovers the secrets behind his wife's death and struggles to expose the killer before it is too late.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A troubled and angry 11-year-old orphan from a small Texas town, ends up at a Boy Choir school after the death of his single mother. Completely out of his element, he finds himself in a battle of wills with a demanding Choir Master who recognises a unique talent in this young boy as he pushes him to discover his creative heart and soul in music.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Billy, a single mother of two, is led into a macabre underworld while her teenage son, Bones, discovers a secret road leading to an underwater town. Both Billy and Bones must dive deep into the mystery if their family is to survive.

programme.title: Absolute Deception
programme.desc: A widowed reporter recruits the help of a federal agent to investigate her late husband's secrets, but the two become the target of unknown attackers. When FBI Agent John Nelson’s key informant, Miles, is abducted and shot, all that’s left is a severed finger. In order to find a new lead, Nelson travels to New York City to inform widowed magazine reporter Rebecca Scott that her long dead husband, Miles, had only recently been murdered to see if she had heard from him in recent years. Perplexed,.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In this Hunger Games spoof, Kantmiss Evershot must fight for her life in the 75th annual Starving Games, where she could also win an old ham, a coupon for a foot-long sub, and a partially eaten pickle.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: The fast-paced action movie is again set in the criminal underworld in France, where Frank Martin is known as The Transporter, because he is the best driver and mercenary money can buy. In this installment, he meets Anna and they attempt to take down a group of ruthless Russian human traffickers who also have kidnapped Frank’s father.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Rowan plays the eponymous lead character in a spoof spy thriller. During the course of the story we follow our hero as he attempts to single-handedly save the country from falling into the hands of a despot.

programme.title: Kung fu hustle
programme.desc: Set in Canton, China in the 1940s, the story revolves in a town ruled by the Axe Gang, Sing who desperately wants to become a member. He stumbles into a slum ruled by eccentric landlords who turns out to be the greatest kung-fu masters in disguise. Sing's actions eventually cause the Axe Gang and the slumlords to engage in an explosive kung-fu battle. Only one side will win and only one hero will emerge as the greatest kung-fu master of all.

programme.title: TRANSFORMERS: RISE OF THE BEASTS
programme.desc: When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, Optimus Prime and the Autobots must team up with a powerful faction known as the Maximals. With the fate of humanity hanging in the balance, humans Noah and Elena will do whatever it takes to help the Transformers as they engage in the ultimate battle to save Earth.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he's finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo's friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: After a botched assassination attempt, the mismatched duo finds themselves in Paris, struggling to retrieve a precious list of names, as the murderous crime syndicate's henchmen try their best to stop.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: For nine generations an evil sorcerer has been victorious in hand-to-hand battle against his mortal enemies. If he wins a tenth Mortal Kombat tournament, desolation and evil will reign over the multiverse forever. To save Earth, three warriors must overcome seemingly insurmountable odds, their own inner demons, and superhuman foes in this action/adventure movie based on one of the most popular video games of all time.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of the most precious resource in existence-a commodity capable of unlocking humanity's greatest potential-only those who can conquer their fear will survive.

programme.title: Mission Impossible: Fallout
programme.desc: When an IMF mission ends badly, the world is faced with dire consequences. As Ethan Hunt takes it upon himself to fulfill his original briefing, the CIA begin to question his loyalty and his motives. The IMF team find themselves in a race against time, hunted by assassins while trying to prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: Tom the cat and Jerry the mouse get kicked out of their home and relocate to a fancy New York hotel, where a scrappy employee named Kayla will lose her job if she can’t evict Jerry before a high-class wedding at the hotel. Her solution? Hiring Tom to get rid of the pesky mouse.

programme.title: Set Up

When he finally comes face to face with his longtime friend he will be forced to make a life changing choice.

programme.desc: While Gwen listens to a lecture on the Transcontinental Railroad, Ben sneaks away to the gift shop. When the Bounty Hunters appear and corner Ben, Gwen must use what she learnt to help him escape.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: As Max attempts to get Ben and Gwen to the Four Corners Monument before sunset, an ominous fog bank engulfs the roadway and forces Max to drive at a snail's pace.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: After Ben gets too much publicity for his alien-antics in Fort Knox, a jealous Gwen feels unappreciated and looks to ease her pain with ice cream. She is soon confronted by Charmcaster.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: After a lull in alien antics, Ben suggests to Max and Gwen that he might be a better hero if he went solo. Vilgax enlists the help of Zombozo to build a giant hypno-mechanism to mesmerise the world.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: While Max and Gwen revel in the holiday spirit of Winter Wonderland, Ben couldn't be more unamused and focussed on the toys. The Weatherheads set their sights on Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: Ben and Max get into an argument and Ben goes Heatblast.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: Gwen and Ben compete to see who can spot more birds first while birdwatching at Pinnacles National Park. A forest fire interrupts their fun and Team Tennyson must hurry to save the bird population.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: As Team Tennyson admires the efficiency of a modern train station, Ben is quick to sniff out one of Steam Smythe's robots holding up the line. The villain then tricks our hero into accepting a duel.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: Billy Billions' efforts to carve his face onto Mount Rushmore with a laser are upset by Ben. The billionaire brat plots to remove Ben from the Omnitrix, accidentally opening a rift in space-time.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: When Ben grows impatient with the snail-like pace of gardening, he goes O-E Overflow to pick up the speed and accidentally floods the community garden.

programme.title: BEN 10 S2

programme.title: BEN 10 S2
programme.desc: As Team Tennyson prepares their boxcar for an upcoming race, Ben starts hearing voices and is unable to go Upgrade to enhance his car. Soon after, a mysterious Warbot interrupts the race.
